Concept placeholder, or details of the live instance.

(The ## headers are a convention this site's tool.html splits back into three display boxes - not a schema requirement, and not enforced if you write something different. This is the SAME schema as case-study.template.json - a tool has no schema of its own; it validates against case-study.schema.json verbatim. What makes this a 'tool' rather than a 'case study' is purely that the file lives in content/tools/. Supports Markdown.)
